lines: Welcome to Hearthveil, young explorer! There is much to discover here.
The realms beyond our village hold great wonders — and great lessons.
Every journey begins with a single step. What will yours be today?
I have seen many explorers pass through Hearthveil. Each one left a little wiser.
no_quest_line: You have done well today. Rest, and return when you are ready for more.
